CustomField.description: MIS-8271 Fix to Reporting Division (opp) Logic MIS-1519 New division fields in SFDC
CustomField.formula:
IF( CloseDate < DATE(2022,01,01), IF( CONTAINS(TEXT(Opportunity_Division__c),'France'), 'France', IF( AND( CONTAINS(TEXT(Opportunity_Division__c),'Reseller'), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Opportunity_Division__c,'Reseller - Japan')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Opportunity_Division__c,'Reseller - ANZ - Direct')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Opportunity_Division__c,'Reseller - Japan-Gaprise'))), 'All other resellers', IF( CONTAINS(TEXT(Opportunity_Division__c),'ROW'), 'ROW', IF( CONTAINS(TEXT(Opportunity_Division__c),'Agencies'), 'Agency (Big 6 + Independent)', CASE(Opportunity_Division__c, 'Reseller - ANZ - Direct', 'ANZ Direct', 'Reseller - Japan','Japan Direct', 'Reseller - Japan-Gaprise','Japan Reseller', 'Channel Sales','All other resellers', 'SDR - Inside Sales','ROW', 'ENT Sales - IM','ROW', 'Raw Data','Raw Data', 'Global Sales - Investors', 'Investors', 'Global CSM - Investors', 'Investors', 'Global Sales - Europe','EU Strategic', 'Global CSM - Europe','EU Strategic', 'Global Sales - UK','EU Strategic', 'ENT Sales - Europe','EU Enterprise', 'SDR EU','EU Enterprise', 'ENT CSM - Europe','EU Enterprise', 'Global Sales - US','NA Strategic', 'Global CSM - US','NA Strategic', 'SMB Sales - US','NA Inside Sales', 'Inside CSM - US','NA Inside Sales', 'ENT Sales - US','NA Enterprise', 'ENT CSM - US','NA Enterprise', 'SMB Sales','ROW', null) ) ) ) ),
CASE(Opportunity_Division__c, 'Raw Data','Raw Data', 'Reseller - ANZ-Trellian','Resellers APAC', 'Reseller - SEA-Maestros','Resellers APAC', 'Reseller - India - Altudo','Resellers APAC', 'Reseller - India - Onnivation','Resellers APAC', 'Reseller - Vietnam - AMS JSC', 'Resellers APAC', 'Reseller - China - TrueMetrics', 'Resellers APAC', 'Reseller - Australia and Pacific Islands - Bring Performance','Resellers APAC', 'Resellers APAC','Resellers APAC',
'Reseller - Brazil - 108','Resellers Americas', 'Reseller - Mexico - Hexagon Data','Resellers Americas', 'Reseller - Brazil - Alpha','Resellers Americas', 'Reseller - Colombia - Indices', 'Resellers Americas', 'Resellers Americas','Resellers Americas',
'Reseller - Turkey-CloudyFlex','Resellers EMEA', 'Reseller - Italy - Nubo','Resellers EMEA', 'Reseller - Finland - Luxid','Resellers EMEA', 'Reseller - UAE - BrentFord Technical Services', 'Resellers EMEA', 'Reseller - Spain - Cartagon', 'Resellers EMEA', 'Reseller - Israel - BDO (VAR)','Resellers EMEA', 'Resellers EMEA','Resellers EMEA',
'Rank Ranger', 'Rank Ranger', 'Channel Sales','Channel Sales',
IF( AND(CONTAINS(text(Opportunity_Division__c), '-'),CloseDate < DATE(2026,01,01)), LEFT(text(Opportunity_Division__c), FIND('-', text(Opportunity_Division__c))-2), TEXT(Opportunity_Division__c) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Reporting Division
